[Intro]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Why men great 'til they gotta be great?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Woo[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
I just took a DNA test, turns out I'm 100% that bitch[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Even when I'm crying crazy[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, I got boy problems, that's the human in me[/tab]

Bling bling, then I solve 'em, that's the goddess in me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
You coulda had a bad bitch, non-committal[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Help you with your career just a little[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
You're 'posed to hold me down, but you're holding me back[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]
And that's the sound of me not calling you back[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
You tried to break my heart?[/tab]

Oh, that breaks my heart[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
That you thought you ever had it[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
No, you ain't from the start[/tab]

Hey, I'm glad you're back with your bitch[/tab]

Ain't worried 'bout a ring on my finger[/tab]
